mapper.select: SELECT id, title, slug, summary, content, cover_url, category_id, author_id, status, allow_comment, view_count, like_count, is_top, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM post WHERE slug = #{slug} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post WHERE deleted = 0
AND status = 1

SELECT id, title, slug, summary, content, cover_url, category_id, author_id, status, allow_comment, view_count, like_count, is_top, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM post WHERE slug = #{slug} AND deleted = 0
AND status = 1
LIMIT 1

SELECT id, title, slug, summary, content, cover_url, category_id, author_id, status, allow_comment, view_count, like_count, is_top, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM post WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
